results.Description: IGF::OT::IGF  NAVSUP BSS RESTORATIONS THE INTENT OF THIS PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT (PWS) IS TO SPECIFY EFFORTS TO SUPPORT NAVAL SUPPLY WEAPON SYSTEM SUPPORT (NAVSUP WSS) BASE LEVEL SUPPORT SERVICE (BSS) RESTORATION REQUIREMENTS IN SSC PAC CODE 43140 DEPOT. THIS WORK IS ANTICIPATED TO BE A COMPLETION-SEVERABLE TYPE TASK. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PERFORM GENERAL REQUIREMENTS  OR NAVSUP WSS DEPOT LEVEL REPAIRABLE ITEMS.  THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PROVIDE NECESSARY RESTORATION SERVICES OF ELECTRONIC OR ELECTRO-MECHANICAL SYSTEMS, SUBASSEMBLIES, AND ASSOCIATED UNITS TO MEET CURRENT APPROVED SPECIFICATIONS WITH A LIFE EXPECTANCY EQUIVALENT TO SIMILARLY CONFIGURED NEW EQUIPMENT. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PERFORM THE PROCESSES OF REPAIR/RECONDITIONING TO AS-MANUFACTURED AND OPERATIONAL OR READY FOR ISSUE  (RFI)CONDITION OF NAVSUP WSS DEPOT LEVEL REPAIRABLE ITEMS IN ACCORDANCE WITH MIL-STD-2110 AND ISO 9001:2008 QUALITY MANUAL.  THE CONTRACTOR SHALL FABRICATE/MANUFACTURE MECHANICAL, ELECTRO-MECHANICAL, AND ELECTRONIC EQUIPMENT IN SUPPORT OF NAVSUP WSS DEPOT LEVEL REPAIRABLES (DLR).  ITEMS REQUIRED TO BE FABRICATED/MANUFACTURED MAY INCLUDE CASES, WIRING HARNESSES, DISCRETE COMPONENTS, CIRCUIT CARD ASSEMBLIES, SUBASSEMBLIES/MODULES AND INTERFACE DEVICES.

results.Description: IGF::OT::IGF  DEPOT FLEET SUPPORT 2Z COG  THE INTENT OF THIS PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT (PWS) IS TO SPECIFY EFFORTS TO SUPPORT THE REPAIR, REFURBISHMENT, MODIFY, OVERHAUL, RESTORE, AND REMANUFACTURE OF ELECTRONIC AND ELECTRO-MECHANICAL EQUIPMENT FOR THE DEPOT FLEET SUPPORT AND 2Z COG RESTORATION PROGRAM REQUIREMENTS IN THE CODE 43140 DEPOT.  THE OBLIGATIONS SET FORTH IN THIS PWS FULFILL REQUIREMENTS FOR CODE 43140 IN SUPPORT OF VARIOUS USN AFLOAT AND SHORE COMMANDS, USCG COMMANDS, VARIOUS SSC ISEA AND ENGINEERING CODES.  THIS WORK IS ANTICIPATED TO BE A COMPLETION-SEVERABLE TYPE TASK. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL INDUCT THE EQUIPMENT AND DISTRIBUTE THE EQUIPMENT TO THE APPROPRIATE WORK CENTER. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL TRACK AND MAINTAIN CONTROL OF THE EQUIPMENT THROUGHOUT THE REFURBISHMENT, RESTORATION AND/OR MANUFACTURE OF THE EQUIPMENT.  THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PERFORM INSPECTION, ANALYSIS, COMPLETE REPAIR, MODIFICATION, OVERHAUL, RESTORATION, REFURBISHMENT, AND REMANUFACTURE INCLUDING CHECK, TEST, AND CERTIFICATION OF EQUIPMENT.  THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PERFORM REPAIR, MODIFICATION, OVERHAUL, RESTORATION, REFURBISHMENT, AND REMANUFACTURE. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PERFORM MATERIAL PURCHASING WHEN REQUIRED AND PARTS ARE UNAVAILABLE IN THE FEDERAL SUPPLY SYSTEM.

results.Description: IGF::OT::IGF  NAVSUP WSS SUPPORT  THE INTENT OF THIS PERFORMANCE WORK STATEMENT (PWS) IS TO SPECIFY EFFORTS TO SUPPORT NAVAL SUPPLY WEAPON SYSTEM SUPPORT (NAVSUP WSS) PERFORMANCE BASED LOGISTICS   ORGANIC (PBLO) RESTORATION REQUIREMENTS IN SSC PAC CODE 43140 DEPOT. HE CONTRACTOR SHALL PERFORM GENERAL REQUIREMENTS FOR NAVSUP WSS DEPOT LEVEL REPAIRABLE ITEMS.  THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PROVIDE NECESSARY RESTORATION SERVICES OF ELECTRONIC OR ELECTRO-MECHANICAL SYSTEMS, SUBASSEMBLIES, AND ASSOCIATED UNITS TO MEET CURRENT APPROVED SPECIFICATIONS WITH A LIFE EXPECTANCY EQUIVALENT TO SIMILARLY CONFIGURED NEW EQUIPMENT. THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PERFORM THE PROCESSES OF REPAIR/RECONDITIONING TO AS-MANUFACTURED AND OPERATIONAL OR READY FOR ISSUE (RFI) CONDITION OF NAVSUP WSS DEPOT LEVEL REPAIRABLE ITEMS IN ACCORDANCE WITH MIL-STD-2110 AND ISO 9001:2008 QUALITY MANUAL.  THE FOLLOWING REPRESENT THE MAJOR PROCESSES - ASSESS, DISASSEMBLE, CLEAN, INSPECT, REPLACE NON-STANDARD / DAMAGED COMPONENTS, PAINT, REMOVE RADAR ABSORBENT MATERIAL (RAM), INSTALL FIELD CHANGES, REASSEMBLE, ALIGN, TEST PER TEST PROCEDURES.  THE CONTRACTOR SHALL FABRICATE/MANUFACTURE MECHANICAL, ELECTRO-MECHANICAL, AND ELECTRONIC EQUIPMENT IN SUPPORT OF NAVSUP WSS DEPOT LEVEL REPAIRABLES (DLR).  ITEMS REQUIRED TO BE FABRICATED/MANUFACTURED MAY INCLUDE CASES, WIRING HARNESSES, DISCRETE COMPONENTS, CIRCUIT CARD ASSEMBLIES, SUBASSEMBLIES/MODULES AND INTERFACE DEVICES.
